summary: Successful Streetwise Checks may enable characters correctly interpret

mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 107 > npcs > Successful Streetwise Checks may enable characters correctly interpret
mechanics.excerpt: Successful Streetwise Checks may enable characters correctly interpret veiled messages or other hidden comments in the speech of criminal and underworld figures, identify crimi- nal hierarchies and deal effectively with street-level contacts such as panhandlers arug dealers and prostitutes Streetwise is regional skill, and as such character must choose particular area subskill for his knowledge such as Streetwise /Draconis Combine_ SHOTGUNS This weapon skill used to make attacks with all shotguns and shotgun-like weapons including needler rifles.
